nasb.text: They have turned their back to Me and not their face; though I taught them, teaching again and again, they would not listen and receive instruction.

esv.text: They have turned to me their back and not their face. And though I have taught them persistently, they have not listened to receive instruction.

cnv.text: 他們以背向我，不以臉向我；我不斷教導他們，他們卻不肯聽從，不接受管教；

ccb.text: 他们不是面向我而是背对我，我不厌其烦地教导他们，他们却不肯听，不受教。
